name: toml
description: TOML file manipulation and validation tools (taplo, toml-cli, dasel)

subcommands.name: lint
subcommands.description: Lint TOML files for schema compliance

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Get a value from a TOML file by key path

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Set a value in a TOML file

subcommands.name: convert
subcommands.description: Convert TOML to JSON or YAML

globalOptions.name: --schema
globalOptions.description: JSON Schema URL or path for validation
